eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Washoe, NV; at 2:18 PM on MAY 3, 2019 Effective until 3:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Missing Hispanic female juvenile, Genesis Reynoso,  age 13, brown hair, brown eyes, small scar under left nostril, five feet tall, one hundred twenty pounds, last seen wearing a blue Vaughn Middle School sweat shirt, black jeans, black back pack with pink and white flowers. Last seen at Vaughn Middle School Thursday May second at two P M. Possibly may be with an older Hispanic male, Diego Martinez, in an unknown car. If seen, call 3 3 4  2 1 2 1.
